name: Hamburgers Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the mushrooms; slice them.
2. Melt margarine in a large skillet over medium heat.
3. Add Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, minced garlic, sliced onion, and mushrooms to the skillet.
4. Cook and stir for 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
5. Mix ground chuck with salt and pepper.
6. Shape into 4 patties, each about 3/4-inch thick.
7. Spoon mushroom-onion mixture to one side of the skillet.
8. Cook patties over medium-high heat, turning once, until desired doneness is reached (about 10 minutes).
9. Serve with mushrooms and onions spooned over the patties.
